response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The transcribed lyrics fully match the audio in the video. Discovered a small typo in the reference lyrics ('たいきってないな' is actually '歌い切って無い無い'), which was manually corrected.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was partially used as a guide, and manual transcription was performed to correct the misheard lyrics and translate the introductory talks.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly precise, matching vocal onsets. Introduced a visual subtitle for the song title card display. Separated fast, consecutive words into discrete blocks to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 書いてあると思うんですけどね、サムネに。
subtitles.english: I think it's already written on the thumbnail, though.

subtitles.original: 二人から、重大告知がございます！
subtitles.english: We have a major announcement from the two of us!

subtitles.original: やった！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: なんと！二人のオリジナルコラボ楽曲が出ます！
subtitles.english: Believe it or not, we are releasing an original collaboration song!

subtitles.original: やったー！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Yay! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: いいんですか？/いいんですか？
subtitles.english: Is this really okay? / Is it really okay?

subtitles.original: ということで、タイトルは...せーの！
subtitles.english: And so, the title is... ready, set, go!

subtitles.original: 最強未来衝動！
subtitles.english: Saikyo Mirai Shodo!

subtitles.original: という、何だか強そうなタイトルですね。
subtitles.english: That's quite a strong-sounding title, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 強い曲ですね。/強い曲です。
subtitles.english: It's a powerful song. / Yes, a powerful song.

subtitles.original: ということで、なんと、今日、初披露させていただきます！
subtitles.english: So, believe it or not, we will perform it for the first time today!

subtitles.original: 頑張ろう！
subtitles.english: Let's do our best!

subtitles.original: それでは早速、聴いてもらえますか。
subtitles.english: Then, without further ado, let's have you listen to it.

subtitles.original: はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: それでは、聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Now then, please listen.

subtitles.original: 最強未来衝動
subtitles.english: [Song: Saikyo Mirai Shodo]

subtitles.original: だから JUST FLY TO THE STAR
subtitles.english: So, JUST FLY TO THE STAR

subtitles.original: もっと WOW WOW
subtitles.english: More, WOW WOW

subtitles.original: 世界中で PROUDY GLOW
subtitles.english: PROUDLY GLOW in the whole world

subtitles.original: 存在など 歌い切って無い無い
subtitles.english: There's no way I've sung all of our existence away

subtitles.original: 壊れても 関係ない
subtitles.english: Even if it breaks, it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: そっと触れるよ 生まれたての星へ
subtitles.english: I will touch the newborn star gently
